# models/

This directory stores trained model artifacts generated by the pipeline.

## Files generated by `python/train_model.py` + `python/evaluate_model.py`:

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| `ae_model.pkl` | Best trained model pipeline (sklearn Pipeline object) |
| `model_metadata.json` | Version, feature names, performance metrics, optimal threshold |
| `all_model_results.json` | Comparison of all 4 models (LR, RF, XGBoost, LightGBM) |
| `shap_explainer.pkl` | Fitted SHAP explainer for interpretability |

## Generate artifacts:

```bash
# Train models (creates ae_model.pkl + metadata)
python python/train_model.py --source synthetic

# Evaluate + SHAP (creates shap_explainer.pkl + plots)
python python/evaluate_model.py

# Or run full pipeline at once:
python run_pipeline.py
# or: make pipeline
```

## Model versioning:

Pass `--version v2` to train_model.py to bump the version tag stored in metadata.
The model file is always `ae_model.pkl` (overwritten); back it up before retraining.
For full versioning, integrate MLflow (docker-compose includes an MLflow server).
